---
title: "\'A Love picture in three strokes\'"
---

## \'A Love picture in three strokes\'

**Author:** Sybella Crawley Boevey
**Date:** 1890
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (Christmas 1890) 234-45

### Notes

See also [[person:381]Sybella Crawley Boevey].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
